# Jitsi Meeting App - Project Setup

## Project Overview
Full-stack application for remote video meetings using Jitsi Meet, with React frontend and Express backend.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the Project
- [ ] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Structure
```
jitsi-meeting-app/
├── frontend/          # React + Vite application
├── backend/           # Express.js server
├── package.json       # Root package for workspaces
└── .github/
    └── copilot-instructions.md
```

## Technologies
- **Frontend**: React 18, Vite, Jitsi Meet IFrame API
- **Backend**: Express.js, CORS, Environment management
- **Tools**: npm workspaces, Concurrently
